creator: issei@jp.FreeBSD.org
text:
Afterstep is a popular window manager with NeXT like look and feel.
The difference from ports-current/x11-wm/afterstep and this port is

1. This port supports Fontset instead of using single font.  This feature
   is necessary for non iso-8859-* language user (e.g. Japanese).

2. This port can use different system-wide config file depends on locale.
   When you use afterstep-i18n on ja_JP.EUC locale, afterstep use

     ${PREFIX}/lib/X11/afterstep/system.steprc.ja_JP.EUC

   as a system-wide config file.
